plugin.zip-import.title: ZIP import
plugin.zip-import.intro: Upload a ZIP: one folder per learner (folder name = display name) with the files inside. The files are attached to the selected "attached by teacher" evidence of each person.
plugin.zip-import.hintCreate: This module has no "attached by teacher" evidence. Create one in the competence grid first.
plugin.zip-import.dropHint: One folder per learner with the files inside.
plugin.zip-import.pickFirst: Please choose a module and evidence first.
plugin.zip-import.badZip: The file is not a valid ZIP.
plugin.zip-import.noFolders: No folders with files were found in the ZIP (expected: one folder per learner).
